column_description: Telegram bot token for sending messages
Array of Telegram chat IDs to send messages to (maximum 5)
Send notification when debit transaction occurs
Send notification when credit transaction occurs
Template for Telegram message with variables: {app_name}, {amount}, {body}
Template for voice notification with variables: {debit_amount}, {credit_amount}, {currency}, {app_name}
Name of the preferred TTS voice (e.g., "Microsoft An - Vietnamese (Vietnam)")
Array of app names that members are allowed to view in debit amount list. NULL/empty = show all apps
